- [ ] `chore` — tooling, dependencies, config

## Checklist

- [ ] My branch is up to date with `main`
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`npm test` and `pytest`)
- [ ] I have added tests for new behaviour where relevant
- [ ] I have updated the documentation if this changes existing behaviour
- [ ] I have run the linter (`npm run lint` and `ruff check .`)
- [ ] I have run the formatter (`npm run format` and `black .`)
- [ ] I have checked Argus's own review comments on this PR and addressed them
